name: uoink
description: Hand your AI a cited local corpus. Uoink saves the YouTube videos, X posts, podcasts, and articles you study to your own disk, then exposes them to Claude Desktop as MCP tools.
long_description: Uoink keeps the videos, podcasts, and articles you study on your own disk, then hands them to Claude as a cited corpus. This bundle connects Claude Desktop to your already-installed Uoink helper's local MCP server (stdio). Install the Uoink helper from https://uoink.app/install first, then install this bundle. Core capture is local and needs no API key; optional AI features use your own Anthropic key.

uoink_dir.title: Uoink install directory
uoink_dir.description: Where the Uoink helper is installed. The Windows default is %LOCALAPPDATA%\Uoink (shown below). Change this only if you installed Uoink somewhere else.

tools.name: uoink_video
tools.description: Extract a single YouTube video into a Uoink corpus.

tools.name: uoink_playlist
tools.description: Start asynchronous extraction for a YouTube playlist.

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Return the full status object for an async Uoink job.

tools.name: cancel_job
tools.description: Cancel an async Uoink job and leave partial outputs on disk.

tools.name: search_uoinks
tools.description: Keyword search across saved Uoink markdown corpora.

tools.name: get_uoink_corpus
tools.description: Return the full markdown corpus for a saved uoink by slug.

tools.name: analyze_comments
tools.description: Run Comment Intelligence on an existing uoink (uses your Anthropic key).

tools.name: classify_hook
tools.description: Classify the hook type for an existing uoink.

tools.name: get_taxonomy
tools.description: Return captured Hook Type taxonomy rows, optionally filtered.

tools.name: get_citation_map
tools.description: Return the transcript + screenshot citation map for a saved uoink.

tools.name: get_uoink_health
tools.description: Return the per-section extraction health score for a saved uoink.

tools.name: find_mentions
tools.description: Find every mention of an entity across saved uoinks, each with a timestamped deep link.

tools.name: get_transcript_reliability
tools.description: Return stored transcript reliability spans for a saved uoink.
